# TCMDB - 中药方剂知识引擎

> Traditional Chinese Medicine knowledge base with herbs, diseases, and herb-disease relationships

## API Endpoints (JSON)

- `GET /api/data.json` - Complete structured data
- `GET /api/entities.json` - All entities flat list
- `GET /api/openapi.json` - OpenAPI 3.1 specification

## Stats

- Total entities: 0
- herbs: 0
- diseases: 0

## Categories

### herbs


### diseases


## Related Knowledge Bases

- [GeneTech](https://genetech.tools) - Pharmacogenomics bridges gene therapy with TCM
- [LifeDB](https://life.genetech.tools) - Natural compounds in synthetic biology
